base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of mega_man_inch_walk — a character from 1987 mega man. InchWalk — 2-frame step cycle (MM1 signature slow walk). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
